scope: handoff for next assistant after v22-v27 and creation of test10

official_baseline.name: official_top200_reference
official_baseline.status: current official comparison baseline, but top200 is not structurally trusted

revalidation_turning_point.note: same-bar leak corrected; pre-v22 top rankings are not final truth

key_milestones.result: baseline_top200 became official baseline over revalidated legacy baseline
topN outperformed score-floor lanes; asym_guard_top150 emerged as practical defense candidate
top200 only triggered on 13 of 47282 candidate timestamps; mechanism remains suspect
hardened absolute score did not replace top200
best no-topN replacement candidate was score_l16_s20_shortheavy, still failed to replace top200

top200_diagnostics.interpretation: top200 is a rare burst control device, not a frequently active general rule

best_no_topn_candidate.name: score_l16_s20_shortheavy
best_no_topn_candidate.interpretation: closest top200-free candidate so far; short-heavy thresholding looks most promising

best_no_topn_pf_candidate.name: asym_guard_score_l16_s20_shortheavy
best_no_topn_pf_candidate.interpretation: better PF, lower return; useful secondary replacement candidate

avoid_or_lower_priority: strong score-floor only variants as main line
treating top200 as proven final deployment rule

next_step_recommendation.goal: replace top200 with topN-free, explainable absolute score structure
